overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a character in a long coat walking through a dark, gothic city at night. The character traverses a riverside walkway beside a massive bridge structure, passes through a covered underpass with NPCs, ascends stone stairs, and continues along an elevated promenade with views of the city skyline and a distant ferris wheel.

scene_state.functional_zone: riverside walkway approaching gothic bridge tower

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the riverside path toward the massive bridge structure

entered.detail: tall stone tower with ornate spires and metal bridge framework attached
weathered stone benches lining the walkway
tall black iron lamppost with ornate design
tall brick industrial building with graffiti on lower walls
stone balustrade separating walkway from water below

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a dimly lit riverside walkway at night, with a massive gothic bridge tower dominating the left side. Stone benches and ornate street lamps line the path while a tall brick building stands on the right, creating an enclosed corridor leading toward the bridge structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway under bridge with storage area

events.description: enters covered underpass beneath the bridge structure
encounters two NPC figures standing near the stone walls in the covered area

agents.ego_description: walking through the dimly lit underpass beneath the bridge, passing NPCs

notable_agents.action: figure standing against stone wall facing the walkway
second figure standing near wooden barrels

entered.detail: dark wooden beams and metal framework of the bridge overhead
rough stone block wall replacing the brick building facade
stacked wooden barrels and crates against the wall

segments.scene_description: The character enters a darker, covered area beneath the bridge where the sky is blocked by wooden beams overhead. The environment shifts to stone walls with wooden barrels stacked against them, and two NPC figures stand in the path before the character continues through the underpass.

events.description: exits underpass and begins ascending stone stairs to upper level

agents.ego_description: climbing stone stairs flanked by high walls, transitioning to upper elevation

entered.detail: wide stone steps ascending between walls
tall stone block wall on the left side of the stairs
large leafy tree visible above the wall

segments.scene_description: Exiting the underpass, the character ascends a flight of stone stairs between high walls. A large tree becomes visible above the left wall as the character climbs toward the upper level, leaving the covered bridge area behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated promenade with city skyline view

events.description: reaches top of stairs and emerges onto open upper walkway with panoramic view
city skyline with illuminated ferris wheel becomes visible in the distance

agents.ego_description: walking along the elevated promenade with expansive views of the city skyline

entered.detail: distant cityscape with various building silhouettes against the night sky
large illuminated ferris wheel visible on the horizon
low stone wall railing along the edge of the promenade
building with warm light glowing from windows

segments.scene_description: The character emerges onto an open elevated promenade with full sky visibility and panoramic views of the city skyline. Trees line the walkway while a distant ferris wheel and illuminated buildings punctuate the dark horizon. The character continues along the stone-paved path with a low parapet on the left overlooking the water.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a confined, dimly lit riverside corridor into an expansive, open-air city promenade. It begins along a riverside walkway where a massive gothic bridge tower and a tall brick building create a narrow path lined with ornate street lamps. As the character moves forward, the scene shifts into a darker, covered underpass beneath the bridge, passing by stacked wooden barrels and waiting figures under a ceiling of heavy wooden beams. The camera then follows the character as they ascend a flight of stone stairs between high walls, with the canopy of a large tree appearing overhead as they climb toward the light. Finally, the environment opens up onto an elevated promenade, revealing a panoramic night skyline featuring illuminated buildings and a distant ferris wheel under a clear sky.
